title: Mission to the Corellian-Perlemian Intersection

The '''mission to the Corellian-Perlemian Hyperspace Intersection''' took place in [[21 BBY/Legends|21 BBY]], 367 standard days after the [[First Battle of Geonosis/Legends|First Battle of Geonosis]]. The mission was conducted under the authority of the [[Grand Army of the Republic/Legends|Grand Army of the Republic]] special operations command, who were responsible for [[Traffic Interdiction Operations]]. [[Clone commando/Legends|Clone commandos]] from [[Omega Squad]] were tasked to interdict and detain the occupants of a [[Gizer L-6 freighter]]. Intelligence indicated that the suspect vessel had left [[Cularin/Legends|Cularin]] bound for [[Denon/Legends|Denon]] and would be reverting to [[Realspace/Legends|realspace]] at the [[Corellian Run/Legends|Corellian]]-[[Perlemian node|Perlemian]] [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]] intersection, in the [[Tynna sector/Legends|Tynna sector]].

==The mission==
The target, a [[Gizer L-6 freighter]] was one of three vessels in a civilian convoy. Unbeknownst to [[Omega Squad]], it was accompanied by another Gizer L-6 being used as a decoy. Omega Squad, aboard [[TIV Z590/1]] lay in wait for the Gizer L-6. When the first vessel arrived the TIV moved to interdict and board but aborted the operation when it was realized that the vessel was in fact a decoy civilian Gizer L-6. The target vessel arrived second and the TIV attached to the hull after a brief exchange of fire. Omega Squad breached the hull and boarded the freighter.

[[File:DeltaSquadSev-TCWs3BR2.png|thumb|left|300px|Delta Squad (members pictured) took part in the mission]]
Once aboard, the commandos secured the cabin and captured two [[Prisoner/Legends|prisoners]]. However, the TIV was then attacked by the civilian freighter, [[Nova Crystal (starship)|''Nova Crystal'']], which had mistakenly identified it as a [[Pirate/Legends|pirate]] craft. The TIV was destroyed with the loss of its [[Clone trooper pilot/Legends|clone trooper pilot]], [[Sicko/Legends|Sicko]]. The loss of the TIV caused the decompression of the L-6's hold also resulting in the loss of the two captured prisoners. The remaining three crew had besieged themselves in the ship's cockpit.

This left Omega Squad in a predicament whereby they were unequipped to survive for long in hard vacuum in their Mark III [[Katarn-class commando armor/Legends|Katarn Armor]]. However, they were able to take the cockpit of the freighter and capture the remaining crew in the process without causing further hull breaches. The prisoners were two [[Nikto/Legends|Nikto]], [[M'truli]] and [[Gysk]], and one [[Human/Legends|Human]], [[Farr Orjul]]. Due to damage to the freighters environment systems, the commandos had to be evacuated quickly, resulting in a [[Red Zero]] distress call for an immediate emergency extraction.

Both the [[Acclamator-class transgalactic military assault ship/Legends|''Acclamator''-class assault ship]] ''[[Fearless]]'' and [[Delta Squad/Legends|Delta Squad]] responded to the Red Zero call and came to evacuate Omega Squad. Delta Squad was the first to arrive and dock with the crippled craft, evacuating Omega Squad while the ''Fearless'' destroyed an attacking [[Neimoidian/Legends|Neimoidian]] starship that had also responded.

Due to the secrecy of the mission, the true nature of the TIVs activity was not released and the skipper of the ''Nova Crystal'' was regarded as a hero for his actions by the [[Perlemian Traffic Control]]. The wreckage of TIV Z590/1 and remains of CT-1127/549 were retrieved by the [[Majestic (Acclamator-class)|''Majestic'']] later the same day.

==Behind the scenes==
While the mission was originally dated to 367 [[Standard day/Legends|days]] after the [[First Battle of Geonosis/Legends|Battle of Geonosis]], ''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]'' later moved ''[[Republic Commando: Triple Zero]]'' up to [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]] to account for continuity changes from the ''[[Star Wars: The Clone Wars]]'' series.
